summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that NWS is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $29.42. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 29.4%. The asset has recently tested this support 1 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $31.00 and a significant trendline confluence around $30.96 (formed by 20 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
